description: Apply FGAP-090's new vocabulary to correct the mistyped/absent edges (depends on TASK-A). In order: (1) File DEC-0018's true forcing artifact as a framework-gaps item — the problem that forced DEC-0018: pi-context update's post-loop registry propagation writes config.json even when a schema returns blocked, ungated on the schema-loop outcome (packages/pi-context/src/index.ts:1391-1421); this is the cause DEC-0018 ruled on (affirming per-component), distinct from FGAP-076 which is the legibility consequence DEC-0018 spawned. (2) Add a decision_addresses_gap edge DEC-0018 -> the new forcing gap, restoring genuine decision-cites-forcing-artifact satisfaction (cause, not consequence). (3) Retype the DEC-0018 -> FGAP-076 edge from decision_addresses_gap to decision_raises_gap via replace-relation — non-breaking once step 2 is in place. (4) Add a decision_gated_by_item edge DEC-0018 -> FGAP-076 (gated thing = parent, gate = child). (5) Add gap_relates_to_gap edges FGAP-090 -> FGAP-007 and FGAP-090 -> FGAP-061. Resolves the edge-correction half of FGAP-090 and repairs DEC-0018's backwards forcing-artifact citation. The step-1 forcing-artifact filing is its own provenance-stopped write.
acceptance_criteria: A framework-gaps item is filed for DEC-0018's forcing problem (the ungated registry-write-on-blocked behavior, index.ts:1391-1421), distinct from FGAP-076; read-back-verified.
find-references DEC-0018 shows: decision_addresses_gap -> the new forcing gap; decision_raises_gap -> FGAP-076 (no longer decision_addresses_gap); decision_gated_by_item -> FGAP-076.
find-references FGAP-090 shows gap_relates_to_gap edges FGAP-090 -> FGAP-007 and FGAP-090 -> FGAP-061.
context-validate emits no decision-cites-forcing-artifact error for DEC-0018 and no new issue beyond the pre-existing baseline.
Every new edge is kind-correct under the relation_types' source/target_kinds and passes TASK-B's write-time validator where in place.
